ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bearings" (
  "bearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bearing type */,
  "bearing_no" TEXT /* Bearing number or model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bearing */,
  "grease_weight_g" REAL /* Weight of grease required in grams */,
  "grease_weight_oz" REAL /* Weight of grease required in ounces */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bearing */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the bearing model was introduced */,
  "operating_temperature" TEXT /* Recommended operating temperature range for the bearing */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed at which the bearing can operate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grease_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grease consumption record */,
  "bearing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bearing */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval for which the grease consumption is measured */,
  "grease_type" TEXT /* Type of grease used for the bearing */,
  "consumption_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for grease consumption */,
  "ten_months" INTEGER /* Grease consumption after 10 months */,
  "eight_months" INTEGER /* Grease consumption after 8 months */,
  "six_months" INTEGER /* Grease consumption after 6 months */,
  "four_months" INTEGER /* Grease consumption after 4 months */,
  "two_months" INTEGER /* Grease consumption after 2 months */,
  "one_month" INTEGER /* Grease consumption after 1 month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grease_consumption_bearing_id FOREIGN KEY ("bearing_id") REFERENCES bearings ("bearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule entry */,
  "bearing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bearing */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "scheduled_by" INTEGER /* User who scheduled the maintenance activity */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for maintenance */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* User who completed the maintenance activity */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance activity was completed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedule_bearing_id FOREIGN KEY ("bearing_id") REFERENCES bearings ("bearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "grease_type" TEXT /* Type of grease */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of grease in stock */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "grease_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the grease in stock */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the grease in stock */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the grease in stock */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the grease is stored */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the grease was ordered */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Expected arrival date of the ordered grease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier based on performance */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_maintenance" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive maintenance alert */,
  "bearing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bearing */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the predictive maintenance alert was generated */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Model used to generate the predictive maintenance alert */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the predictive maintenance alert */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on predictive analysis */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was raised */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_maintenance_bearing_id FOREIGN KEY ("bearing_id") REFERENCES bearings ("bearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost analysis record */,
  "bearing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bearing */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the cost is expressed */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used to convert the cost to a standard currency */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of grease and maintenance for the bearing */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of grease or maintenance activity */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_analysis_bearing_id FOREIGN KEY ("bearing_id") REFERENCES bearings ("bearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factory the user is assigned to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_factory_id FOREIGN KEY ("factory_id") REFERENCES factories ("factory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factories" (
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factory */,
  "factory_name" TEXT /* Name of the factory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the factory */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the factory */,
  "factory_manager" TEXT /* Manager of the factory */,
  "factory_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the factory */,
  "factory_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the factory */,
  "factory_email" TEXT /* Email address of the factory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used by the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Detailed list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "date_raised" TEXT /* Date the alert was raised */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_category" TEXT /* Category of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
